near_miss_tensions.description: src-01 alone does not explicitly state whether expired or malformed tokens should be 401 or 403; a reader could potentially misread it as leaving room for 403. src-02 resolves this by explicitly prohibiting 403 for those cases.
near_miss_tensions.resolution: Not a contradiction. src-02 refines and closes the edge case; the two sources are mutually consistent when read together. No conflict remains.

assessment: No contradictions detected in the source set. The one near-miss tension (expired/malformed token handling) is fully resolved by the explicit language in src-02. The source set is safe to package without contradiction warnings.
